problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Sentinel-AI: Multi-Modal & Explainable Procurement Evaluation Engine
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, understand bidders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports. The platform uses a multi-modal, human-in-the-loop (HITL) pipeline to handle heterogeneous bidder documents, extract tender criteria, and provide mathematical confidence scores with bounding-box evidence.
key_steps: Problem Understanding & The Realities of Procurement
Explainability & The 'No Silent Rejection' HITL Protocol
optimization_claims: Direct hyperlinking to the exact highlighted evidence
